As a QA Engineer, I want to connect my Jira Cloud instance using Site URL, Email, and API Token so that the platform can securely access projects and user stories.

Acceptance Criteria:
1. Enter valid Jira URL, email and API token.
2. Validate credentials.
3. Show Connected status.
4. Show error for invalid credentials.
5. Store credentials securely.

As a QA Engineer, I want to fetch all Jira projects after connecting so that I can choose which project to automate.

Acceptance Criteria:
1. List projects.
2. Display project key and name.
3. Refresh supported.
4. Handle API errors.

As a QA Engineer, I want to import sprints from a selected project so that I can synchronize sprint stories.

Acceptance Criteria:
1. Select project.
2. Display sprints.
3. Import sprint metadata.
4. Complete successfully.

As a QA Engineer, I want to import all user stories from a sprint so that they become available for AI analysis.

Acceptance Criteria:
1. Import stories.
2. Avoid duplicates.
3. Update changed stories.
4. Show import summary.

As a QA Engineer, I want AI to analyze an imported story so that I understand complexity, risks and automation feasibility.

Acceptance Criteria:
1. Analyze story.
2. Calculate complexity.
3. Calculate risk.
4. Recommend test types.
5. Save analysis.

As a QA Engineer, I want AI to generate functional test cases from a story so that manual effort is reduced.

Acceptance Criteria:
1. Generate positive cases.
2. Generate negative cases.
3. Generate boundary cases.
4. Avoid duplicates.
5. Allow editing.

As a QA Lead, I want to review and approve AI-generated test cases before automation begins.

Acceptance Criteria:
1. Review cases.
2. Edit.
3. Approve/Reject.
4. Save comments.
5. Only approved continue.

As a QA Automation Engineer, I want approved test cases converted into Gherkin feature files.

Acceptance Criteria:
1. Generate feature.
2. Correct Given/When/Then.
3. Use Scenario Outline where needed.
4. Download feature file.

As a QA Automation Engineer, I want AI to generate Playwright automation scripts from approved BDD scenarios.

Acceptance Criteria:
1. Generate POM.
2. Generate locators.
3. Generate tests.
4. Follow framework.

Summary: Execute Automation Suite and Generate Report
Description:
As a QA Engineer, I want to execute generated automation scripts and receive execution reports.

Acceptance Criteria:
1. Execute suite.
2. Show pass/fail.
3. Capture screenshots.
4. Store report.
5. AI failure analysis ready.
